snippets: KPR Institute of Engineering & Technology (KPRIET), Coimbatore, is a premier autonomous institution affiliated with Anna University and approved by AICTE. The college emphasizes innovation, placements, and experiential learning. ... # KPR Institute of Engineering & Technology Coimbatore
## FAQs on KPR Institute of Engineering & Technology Coimbatore Fees
#### What is the annual fee for B.Tech under government quota?
The annual tuition fee is ₹85,000 for government quota students.

Yes, both AC and non-AC hostels are available with fees ranging from ₹80,000 to ₹95,000.

Yes, scholarships based on merit, sports achievements, and financial need are provided.

Optional transport facility is available for ₹15,000 – ₹20,000 annually.

# KPR Institute of Engineering & Technology Coimbatore
## Fee Structure at KPR Institute of Engineering & Technology Coimbatore
### Annual Tuition Fees
| Category | Tuition Fee (₹) |
| --- | --- |

| Government Quota | ₹85,000 |
| Management Quota | ₹1,40,000 |

| Fee Component | Amount (₹) |
| --- | --- |

| Hostel & Mess | ₹80,000 – ₹95,000 |
| Transport (Optional) | ₹15,000 – ₹20,000 |
| Lab & Library Charges | ₹7,500 |

‍

* **Government Quota:** Through TNEA counseling
* **Management Quota:** Direct application at www.kpriet.ac.in

KPRIET offers 36 courses at UG, PG courses in Full Time mode. KPRIET UG Fees is Rs 2.7 Lakhs - 3.88 Lakhs. KPRIET PG Fees is Rs 1 Lakh. The top courses at the institute include B.Tech, B.E, BE {Lateral}. KPRIET B.Tech Fees is Rs 3.88 Lakhs for the 4 year program. KPRIET BE {Lateral} Fees is Rs 2.7 Lakhs for the 3 year program.
